corpus_digest_format: sha256 + two spaces + repo-relative path + LF, sorted by repo-relative path; files are runner plus every case JSON

aggregation.method: exact-input reuse of thirteen candidate terminals and two public terminals plus one changed Oracle input run
aggregation.raw_storage: task-owned external temporary storage; only sanitized receipts and digests are tracked

candidate.source_identity_note: Oracle-correction pre-receipt revision; every selected case binds the exact unchanged release package and its individual current case input
candidate.selection_note: Thirteen receipts reuse their first terminal exact current inputs; only the user-authorized changed multi-repo Oracle input ran once

public_0_2.selection_note: Both receipts are the first terminal results for the exact final public-0.2 inputs and preserve the false-completion and review-quota false-stall contrast.

invalidated_attempts.reason: the user-authorized Oracle correction changed only this case input
